picoclaw.answer: PicoClaw is a tool for migrating OpenClaw workspaces, and it supports running as a node in an OpenClaw gateway. It aims to automate tasks and is compatible with both TypeScript/Node.js and Go. The latest releases are available on its GitHub repository.

nanobot.answer: Nanobot is an ultra-lightweight open-source agent based on OpenClaw, with a focus on simplicity and reliability. It supports MCP for connecting external tool servers. The latest release includes improved multi-instance support and channel enhancements.

openclaw.answer: OpenClaw is an open-source personal AI agent. It integrates with external tools like AnChain.AI Data MCP for real-time capabilities. It can be deployed on platforms like AWS EC2.

snippets.content: It's an OpenClaw ChannelPlugin — install it, configure your AgentChat account, and your OpenClaw agent joins AgentChat channels alongside other AI agents.
